service.aboutPara1L: Pacred Shipping — your end-to-end import-export and customs clearance specialist with over 14 years of experience. We handle every step from sourcing to delivery, all in one place. Whether you're sourcing from China or anywhere worldwide — 1688, Taobao, Tmall — we provide secure payment-transfer service with the best rates and full transparency.
service.aboutPara2L: If you already have goods to sell, whether you're an individual, a registered business, or an enterprise, we help you expand to overseas markets with full distributor and export services — managing documentation, logistics, and every step of the process for you.
service.aboutPara1R: On top of that, we have a professional Chinese-language interpreter team to help you contact, negotiate, and close deals with factories — free of charge. We cut your sourcing costs and guarantee the best prices, plus full Door-to-Door import service covering every step from sourcing, ordering, shipping, to customs clearance and final delivery.
service.aboutPara2R: Pacred is committed to service that's "fast, sharp, and never says 'can't be done'" — every step of the way. With a professional team of 14+ years of experience in import, export, customs clearance, and purchasing, we're ready to solve every problem for you.
service.feature1Desc: 1688, Taobao, Alibaba, Tmall — whatever store you order from, we verify and close every deal, with delivery guaranteed.
service.feature2Desc: Whether FCL, LCL, import-export, customs clearance, or stuck cargo — our quality team handles every step end-to-end with 14+ years of experience. Fast, sharp, never says 'can't be done'.
service.feature3Title: QC at Every Step — Quality Guaranteed
service.feature3Desc: Trust us — whether you're a small SME, mid-size, or large enterprise, we provide QC service at the warehouse to guarantee product quality.
service.feature4Desc: Slow imports? Cargo stuck at customs? Whatever the issue, we clear it — fast and decisive. Never 'can't be done'.
service.feature5Desc: Import with us today and get flat-rate ฿50 delivery across Bangkok and surrounding areas.
service.feature6Desc: Crystal-clear costs — every customer gets an SMS notification on every payment.

clearanceFaq.subheading: The questions customers ask most — if yours isn't here, chat with us on LINE, we reply within 5 minutes
clearanceFaq.feesQ: How is the customs-clearance service fee calculated?
clearanceFaq.feesA: The fee depends on 3 factors: (1) the checkpoint/port where goods are held (2) goods type (general / TISI / controlled) and (3) document status (complete / incomplete / HS Code issues). A normal case starts at 2,800 baht. We quote the price clearly upfront, 100% with no hidden charges.
clearanceFaq.docsHsCodeQ: Documents incomplete or unsure which HS Code to use — what do I do?
clearanceFaq.docsHsCodeA: Send whatever you have via LINE / Email and the Pacred team will help determine the correct HS Code tariff, prepare the missing documents, and coordinate with the origin factory/seller. Customers don't have to handle every step themselves.
clearanceFaq.durationQ: How many hours/days does clearance take?
clearanceFaq.durationA: Normal jobs with complete documents: 1–3 hrs, goods released same day. Jobs needing extra permits (TISI/NBTC): 1–5 business days depending on the agency. Our team gives you a precise timeline after reviewing the documents.
clearanceFaq.taxesQ: What taxes do I have to pay?
clearanceFaq.taxesA: 1) Import Duty per the HS Code tariff 2) Value Added Tax (VAT 7%) calculated from CIF + duty 3) Excise tax (if applicable, e.g. beverages, perfume). We offer free advance tax calculation.
clearanceFaq.formEQ: What is Form E and what reduction does it give?
clearanceFaq.formEA: Form E is a certificate of origin under the China–ASEAN FTA, reducing import duty to as low as 0% for many tariff lines. If you bought goods from China but don't have Form E yet, we help coordinate with the factory to issue it.
clearanceFaq.penaltyQ: My goods are stuck at customs now — how are the fine/storage charges calculated?
clearanceFaq.penaltyA: Fines and storage are charged daily, accruing from the date goods arrive — the longer they sit, the more expensive. We recommend sending documents to our team the day you learn of the issue to stop the charges and start clearing immediately.
clearanceFaq.individualQ: I'm not a company, just an individual — can I still clear customs?
clearanceFaq.individualA: Yes — both individuals and juristic persons. Pacred registers you as an importer/exporter for free and pairs your code (YY) with the Customs Department within 30 minutes, ready to use immediately.
clearanceFaq.portsA: Every checkpoint in Thailand: Suvarnabhumi · Don Mueang · Bangkok Port (Khlong Toei) · Laem Chabang · ICD Lat Krabang · Lak Si Post · Mukdahan · Nong Khai · Aranyaprathet · Mae Sai

pacredExperience.p1: Pacred Shipping opens up the experience — an import–export shipping specialist with full-service customs clearance, more than 14 years. We handle everything from upstream to downstream, all in one place — order from 1688 / Taobao / Tmall through Pacred and let us pay for your goods safely, with great rates, transparent and verifiable.
pacredExperience.p2: Not only that, we also have a professional Chinese interpreter team to contact, negotiate, and close factory deals for free, helping you cut product costs and get the best price for sure — plus Door-to-Door import service covering every step, from sourcing, ordering, shipping, and customs clearance, all the way to delivery to your hands.
pacredExperience.p3: For those who already have goods — whether you're an individual, a company, or a business — we're ready to help you expand your market with distribution and export services abroad, taking care of documents, logistics, and every step in full.
pacredExperience.p4: Pacred focuses on service that's “fast, sharp, never say it can't be done” at every step, with a professional team of more than 14 years of experience — import–export, clearance, sourcing — we're ready to solve every problem end to end.
pacredExperience.p5: Whether importing from China or exporting worldwide, sourcing, paying on your behalf, or expanding your business abroad — let Pacred Shipping handle it, and you'll understand what “truly all-in-one” means.

howToUsePage.heroDescription: Pick the service you need below and follow the step-by-step guide — no prior shipping experience required.
howToUsePage.tocFwdSub: Ship goods from China to Thailand
howToUsePage.tocShopSub: We buy Chinese goods for you
howToUsePage.fwdSectionTitle: For Import Customers (ship goods from China)
howToUsePage.fwdIntro: Use this when you have already purchased goods in China — items are at our China warehouse (Guangzhou / Yiwu) — you just need Pacred to ship them to Thailand and clear customs.
howToUsePage.fwdStep1Body: Go to /service-import and tap+ New Shipment
howToUsePage.fwdStep2Body: Pick origin warehouse (Guangzhou/Yiwu) + transport type (truck / sea / air) + goods type (general / TISI / FDA / special) — price is calculated instantly (weight vs volume — Auto picks the higher value).
howToUsePage.fwdStep3Title: Add Thai delivery address + upload box photo
howToUsePage.fwdStep3Body: Enter recipient name, phone, and address in Thailand + attach a box photo/slip (so the China team can identify your shipment), then tap <pill>Submit Import Request</pill>.
howToUsePage.fwdStep4Title: Pay from wallet or top up first
howToUsePage.fwdStep4Body: After creating the shipment you get an F-no — on that page tapPay from wallet now if you have enough balance — otherwise tapTop up first, then return to pay.
howToUsePage.fwdStep5Body: Track status on your F-no page: Left China → In transit → Arrived Thailand → Out for delivery → Delivered — once goods arrive and are checked, tap📥 Confirm full receipt to close the order.
howToUsePage.fwdTip: Corporate customers: once the order is paid, open the F-no page, tap 🖨 View Invoice → scroll to the bottom to find📄 Request Tax Invoice.
howToUsePage.shopSectionTitle: For Shop-Order Customers (we buy Chinese goods for you)
howToUsePage.shopIntro: Use this when you find Chinese products (1688 / Taobao / Tmall etc.) but can't buy directly — Pacred will purchase, consolidate at the China warehouse, and ship everything to Thailand.
howToUsePage.shopStep1Body: Go to /service-order/add → paste the product URL (1688 / Taobao / Tmall) or add manually → specify color / size / quantity → tap Add Item.
howToUsePage.shopStep2Body: When your cart is ready, go to /service-order/cart → choose Thai delivery address + origin warehouse + transport type → tapPlace Order — you'll get an H-no and a THB total.
howToUsePage.shopStep3Body: Payment is required within 24 hrs or the order is auto-cancelled — tap<pill>Pay from wallet</pill> or top up first.
howToUsePage.shopStep4Title: System handles the steps — just track
howToUsePage.shopStep4Body: After payment → Ordered → Awaiting China shipping → At China warehouse → Left China → Delivered — track at /service-order.
howToUsePage.shopStep5Body: When status shows "Completed" and all goods have arrived, tap<pill>📥 Confirm full receipt</pill> on the H-no page — corporates: tap <pill>📄 Download Receipt PDF</pill> → request a tax invoice at the bottom.
howToUsePage.shopTip: Missing items? Open the H-no page → check below the status — if a refund is due, the system will show it automatically, or go to /refunds.
howToUsePage.yuanSectionTitle: For Yuan-Transfer Customers (pay Chinese stores yourself)
howToUsePage.yuanIntro: Use this when you have already negotiated with a Chinese seller and need Pacred to transfer yuan via Alipay / WeChat / Chinese bank (no shop-order flow needed).
howToUsePage.yuanStep1Title: Check rate + open a payment request
howToUsePage.yuanStep1Body: Go to /service-payment — current CNY→THB rate is shown at the top → tap + Add Payment Request.
howToUsePage.yuanStep2Body: Choose Alipay / WeChat / Bank → enter recipient account, name, and note — enter the yuan amount and the system converts it to THB automatically.
howToUsePage.yuanStep3Title: Pay from wallet or attach a transfer slip
howToUsePage.yuanStep3Body: If your wallet has enough → tick <pill>💳 Deduct from wallet</pill> — otherwise transfer to Pacred's account, attach the slip + ID card photo (fraud prevention), and submit to the team.
howToUsePage.yuanStep4Title: Wait for team transfer + confirm success
howToUsePage.yuanStep4Body: The team reviews → transfers → completes — status updates automatically on the list page + notification in /notifications.
howToUsePage.yuanStep5Body: Once status is "Completed", open the transaction detail → scroll down to find 📄 Request Tax Invoice — available only for corporates with a 13-digit tax ID in their profile.

svcChinaShopping.faq1Q: How does Pacred charge for China shop-ordering?
svcChinaShopping.faq1A: The fee = goods cost (factory price) + yuan transfer (current rate) + China-Thailand freight (by weight/CBM) + import duty (by HS Code) — we give the full Total Landed Cost on one quote before you confirm, with no hidden fees
svcChinaShopping.faq2Q: What's the difference between 1688, Taobao and Tmall?
svcChinaShopping.faq2A: 1688 = wholesale · real bulk prices · minimum order · for business owners · Taobao = retail · order single units · widest range · for personal use · Tmall = Alibaba platform for brands-genuine-quality · for customers who need source assurance
svcChinaShopping.faq3Q: What's the minimum order to use the service?
svcChinaShopping.faq3A: There's no minimum — order a single small item (Taobao) or bulk from a 1688 factory. Pacred consolidates everything into one shipment, making freight cheaper than ordering separately
svcChinaShopping.faq4Q: How many days does it take in total?
svcChinaShopping.faq4A: Depends on the mode · air 7-10 days (pay → arrives in Thailand) · sea LCL 15-20 days · road 10-14 days, including factory prep + China inland + China-Thailand freight + tax clearance + domestic delivery
svcChinaShopping.faq5A: When goods reach Pacred's China warehouse — the team counts · photographs · power-tests (for electronics) · checks size-color-spec against your order, and sends images and status before export. If anything is off-spec, the team handles claim-replace-return on your behalf
svcChinaShopping.faq6A: Pacred's rate follows the day's mid CNY-THB rate + a small transfer fee. See the current rate on our homepage or LINE the team — give the amount + destination account (Alipay/WeChat/Bank) and transfer right away
svcChinaShopping.faq7Q: Can you order controlled goods like cosmetics?
svcChinaShopping.faq7A: Yes — but you need a permit from FDA/TISI/NBTC before import. Pacred helps prepare documents · liaise with agencies · check HS Code · ready the data for the permit application, taking about 7-30 days
svcChinaShopping.faq8Q: Can you issue a tax invoice (Por.Por.20)?
svcChinaShopping.faq8A: Yes — Pacred is a VAT-registered company (7%) and issues tax invoices for every order, for both individuals and companies. Receipts and tax invoices are tax-deductible

svcExportWorldwide.faq0Q: Which countries can you export to?
svcExportWorldwide.faq0A: Pacred exports worldwide to 200+ destinations — covering Asia (China/Japan/Korea/ASEAN/India) · Europe (EU/UK/Switzerland) · Americas (USA/Canada/LATAM) · Middle East (UAE/Saudi) · Australia-NZ · Africa. Our team recommends the best route and Incoterm for your buyer and product type.
svcExportWorldwide.faq1A: It depends on your agreement with the buyer. FOB/CFR/CIF are popular for Sea Freight · DDP suits buyers who want door delivery without handling duties · EXW when the buyer wants full control of transport. Pacred advises on the right Incoterm for your real conditions.
svcExportWorldwide.faq2Q: What are the starting export prices?
svcExportWorldwide.faq2A: Depends on channel (Air/Sea/Express) · volume · destination · Incoterm — Express courier from ~฿300–500/kg for documents · Sea LCL ~$150–300/CBM · FCL 20' from ~$500–1,500/container by destination · Air Freight ~$3–8/kg. Our team always quotes before you confirm.
svcExportWorldwide.faq3Q: How many days does it take?
svcExportWorldwide.faq3A: Air Freight: 3–7 days · Express courier: 2–5 days · Sea Freight (by destination) — Asia 7–14 days · Australia 12–18 days · Europe 25–35 days · Americas 25–40 days · Africa 30–45 days. Includes pickup + clearance + transit + destination clearance (if DDP).
svcExportWorldwide.faq4A: Core docs — Commercial Invoice + Packing List + B/L or AWB · export customs declaration · preferential docs (Form A/D/E for duty reduction) · CO (Certificate of Origin) · For specific goods — Phytosanitary (plants) · Health Certificate (food) · Fumigation Certificate (wood). Pacred prepares everything.
svcExportWorldwide.faq5Q: What certificates are needed to export food or plants?
svcExportWorldwide.faq5A: Food export — Health Certificate (FDA) + Halal (Muslim markets) + Health/Phytosanitary from Fisheries Dept (seafood) · Plant/flower export — Phytosanitary Certificate from Dept of Agriculture · Wood export — Fumigation Certificate per ISPM-15. Pacred coordinates all agencies.
svcExportWorldwide.faq6Q: Can I get Form E to reduce import duty into China?
svcExportWorldwide.faq6A: Yes — Pacred obtains Form E (CO Form E) under the ASEAN-China FTA for exports to China · Chinese buyers receive the ASEAN-China reduced duty rate · processing takes approximately 3–5 business days.

svcImportChina.faqQ0: Should I choose FCL or LCL for importing from China?
svcImportChina.faqA0: It depends on volume — over 15 CBM we recommend FCL (full container) for better value · under 15 CBM use LCL (shared) and pay only for actual CBM/KG · FCL reduces lead time + lowest cost per unit · LCL is ideal for starting out and testing the market
svcImportChina.faqQ1: How many days does Pacred take for importing from China?
svcImportChina.faqA1: Depends on mode — FCL sea 15-20 days · LCL sea 15-25 days · Air Freight 3-5 days · cross-border truck 5-7 days. Times are from goods entering China warehouse to destination in Thailand
svcImportChina.faqQ2: How is the shipping cost from China calculated?
svcImportChina.faqA2: FCL is priced per container 20'/40'/40HQ — flat rate regardless of how full · LCL is priced by CBM (volume) or KG (weight), whichever is higher. The team provides a full Total Landed Cost (shipping + import duty + VAT + clearance) in one quote before confirmation
svcImportChina.faqQ3: How much import duty will I need to pay?
svcImportChina.faqA3: The rate depends on the HS Code of the product — typically 0-30% of the CIF value. Most items qualify for Form E under the ASEAN-China FTA, reducing duty to as low as 0% for many goods. VAT of 7% is charged on top of the import duty
svcImportChina.faqQ4: What is Form E and how do I use it?
svcImportChina.faqA4: Form E (Certificate of Origin Form E) certifies that goods are made in China — it reduces import duty under the ASEAN-China FTA agreement. Pacred requests Form E from your Chinese supplier and verifies it before use — at no extra cost
svcImportChina.faqQ5: What documents are needed to import from China?
svcImportChina.faqA5: Basic documents — Invoice + Packing List (from Chinese supplier) · Pacred will request — B/L or AWB · Form E · Customs declaration · Specific permits for controlled goods (FDA/TIS/TISI/NBTC) if applicable
svcImportChina.faqQ6: Don't speak Chinese or can't contact the supplier yourself?
svcImportChina.faqA6: Use our China Shopping (proxy buying) service — Pacred's Chinese interpreter team closes deals with factories, verifies specs, and checks quality on your behalf — just send us the product link (1688/Taobao/Tmall/Alibaba)
svcImportChina.faqQ7: Can controlled goods like cosmetics and supplements be imported?
svcImportChina.faqA7: Yes — but FDA approval is required before import. Pacred helps prepare documents · coordinates with FDA/TIS/TISI/NBTC/Department of Agriculture · checks HS Code · prepares permit application data. Preparation takes approximately 7-30 days depending on the product type

svcImportChinaFcl.faq0Q: What order size is FCL suitable for?
svcImportChinaFcl.faq0A: FCL is economical when cargo exceeds 15-20 CBM — for smaller orders LCL is better value, as FCL charges for the whole container regardless of fill. Pacred's team can calculate the right choice before you confirm.
svcImportChinaFcl.faq1Q: What is the starting price for China-Thailand FCL?
svcImportChinaFcl.faq1A: China-Thailand FCL freight depends on origin port (Shenzhen/Shanghai/Ningbo/Yiwu) · destination port (Laem Chabang/Bangkok) · container size · season (peak/off-peak). Indicative rates — 20' from $500 · 40' from $850 · 40HQ from $900 (freight only, excludes Origin + Destination charges). Team provides a full Total Landed Cost quote before every confirmation.
svcImportChinaFcl.faq2Q: How many days does it take?
svcImportChinaFcl.faq2A: China-Thailand FCL by sea — transit time 8-12 days (origin port to Laem Chabang) + 2-3 days factory-to-port + 2-3 days customs clearance + Thai domestic delivery. Total ~15-20 days.
svcImportChinaFcl.faq3A: Main Thai destination ports — Laem Chabang (most popular, handles largest containers) · Bangkok/Klong Toey (best for city customers) · ICD Lat Krabang (inland depot for truck onward) · Aranyaprathet/Mukdahan (cross-border truck for southern China)
svcImportChinaFcl.faq4Q: Which Incoterm is best for FCL?
svcImportChinaFcl.faq4A: DDP is most popular — Pacred handles everything, you just receive · FOB is common too, seller ships to China port, Pacred handles onward · EXW suits buyers who want to control factory pickup · CIF suits suppliers who already pay freight+insurance to Thailand
svcImportChinaFcl.faq5Q: What if the empty container is damaged or lost?
svcImportChinaFcl.faq5A: Pacred manages Container Damage insurance fully — if the container is damaged in transit, the carrier files the claim and Pacred handles all documentation. For cargo inside the container, we recommend adding Cargo Insurance (available as add-on).
svcImportChinaFcl.faq6Q: How long does customs clearance take once the container arrives in Thailand?
svcImportChinaFcl.faq6A: If documents are ready — clearance + container release takes 2-3 days. If there are documentation/HS code/permit issues it may take longer. Pacred's team resolves all types of customs complications.
svcImportChinaFcl.faq7Q: What are Demurrage / Detention? Are there hidden charges?
svcImportChinaFcl.faq7A: Demurrage = port storage fee (if container release is delayed) · Detention = off-dock container use fee (if empty return is delayed). Pacred manages timing so containers leave within the carrier's Free Time (typically 7-14 days). If charges still occur, the team notifies you in advance and negotiates on your behalf.

svcYuanTransfer.faqQ1: How is Pacred's yuan transfer rate better?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA1: Pacred uses the daily CNY-THB mid-rate + a low service fee. You see the rate before confirming — no hidden charges. Check the latest rate on our homepage or message our team; we'll quote the rate, fee, and total THB required.
svcYuanTransfer.faqQ2: Which channels can I transfer to?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA2: Pacred covers all channels — Alipay (支付宝) · WeChat Pay (微信支付) · Chinese bank accounts (ICBC, CCB, BOC, ABC, CMB etc.) · UnionPay debit card · works with 1688 · Taobao · Tmall · JD · Pinduoduo · OEM factory payments · deposits · LC.
svcYuanTransfer.faqQ3: How long does the transfer take?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA3: Alipay/WeChat: within 1-2 business hours · Chinese bank: 2-4 hours · UnionPay: 4-6 hours · Transfers outside business hours (after 17:00 or weekends) are processed on the next business morning.
svcYuanTransfer.faqQ4: What is the minimum and maximum transfer amount?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA4: Minimum is 100 yuan · no maximum limit · for amounts over 50,000 yuan, additional documents (Invoice/PO/trade proof) may be required — the team will notify you before confirmation.
svcYuanTransfer.faqQ5: Do you issue receipts and tax invoices?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA5: Yes — Pacred is VAT-registered (7%) · full receipt + tax invoice issued for every order, usable for Por.Por.30 deduction · request under individual or corporate name — just tell the team when confirming.
svcYuanTransfer.faqQ6: Does Pacred know my Alipay/WeChat password?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA6: No — Pacred transfers from our own Alipay/WeChat account to the destination you specify. You never share a password, log in for anyone, or need your own Alipay/WeChat account. 100% safe.
svcYuanTransfer.faqQ7: How do I get a slip or proof of transfer?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA7: Once the transfer is done, the team immediately sends proof (screenshot/summary) showing CNY amount, transfer time, destination account, and transaction number — ready to share with your factory or seller.
svcYuanTransfer.faqQ8: What if the transfer goes to the wrong account?
svcYuanTransfer.faqA8: Pacred always verifies the destination before sending · if a wrong transfer is caused by incorrect info from the customer, the team will contact the recipient to request a return (not 100% guaranteed) · we recommend confirming the account via Alipay/WeChat QR before finalising.
